title: Per-project lesson-suppression mute list (RFC-009 R1, plan REQ-13/14)
description: Schema for <project>/.episodic-memory/lesson-suppress.json — a per-project, hand-authored mute list consulted by the activation event plane (P2 R3/R4). Mutes by EPISODE ID ONLY, across ALL bands including earned 8-9 (RFC-009 line 61). Read-side whole-file validation is fail-open at the hook (P2-S4): missing OR syntax-malformed OR shape-malformed (this schema failing) all degrade to an empty mute set with one stderr note, never fatal. No `em-suppress` writer ships this phase (RFC-009 line 61); the file is hand-edited by the project operator.

episode_id.description: The lesson episode id to mute in THIS project, any band.

reason.description: Operator-facing rationale for the mute (a scope call, not a content correction — RFC-009 line 61).
